introSection: Super Roller Coaster DIOS (Japanese: スーパーローラーコースター ディオス) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Odakyu Mukogaoka Yuen in Kawasaki, Kanagawa, Japan.

fullText:
Super Roller Coaster DIOS (Japanese: スーパーローラーコースター ディオス) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Odakyu Mukogaoka Yuen in Kawasaki, Kanagawa, Japan.



Light blue track and white supports.




 * Super Roller Coaster DIOS on the parks website (In Japanese)
 * Pictures of Super Roller Coaster DIOS (In Japanese)
